sources.limitations: Synthetic benchmark travel-history source. Supports closed-world absence only for U.S. entry/exit events recorded by CBP within its coverage window. Does not support absence of exception filings, employment status, intent, or reasons for travel.
sources.title: CBP travel-history printout

sources.limitations: Shows no exception document included in the submitted packet. Supports closed-world absence only for documents submitted in this packet (e.g., N-470 preservation approval, qualifying employment-abroad approval, military service exception, religious-vocation exception). Does not establish whether such exceptions exist outside the packet, nor speak to underlying eligibility or facts of travel.
sources.title: Case packet index
